---
title: "Introduction to Shiny Modules"
---

:::{.column-page-inset-right}

{{< revealjs file="/slides/08-modules_intro.html" height="500px" class="ratio ratio-16x9" >}}

:::

# Slide Contents

{{< include /slides/08-modules_intro.qmd >}}

# Code

:::{.column-page-inset}

Shiny Core version:

```{.python}
{{< include /../code/demos/filter_module_core.py >}}
```

:::
